title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited:
Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
